---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "[feat]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What pain point or use case is this solving? Be specific. Avoid solution-first framing.

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it working. API sketch, CLI command, config snippet, anything concrete.

## Alternatives considered

What else you considered and why this is better.

## Scope

Is this core, runtime, CLI, inspector, docs, or cloud? V1 or V2+?

## Additional context

Links to similar features in other tools, prior art, references.
